text.title: Cognitive Inclusion Design Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Does user-facing copy meet the plain-language target (Flesch ≥60 / Grade ≤8)?

text.example: Concrete walk: Signup flow: copy scores Flesch=72 / Grade=6, delete action has 10s undo toast → approve.
